Title: Verify the creation of a new user profile
Preconditions: User has downloaded and opened the PICKAPP application
Test Data: User's name, email, and phone number
Test Steps:
1. Tap the "Sign Up" button on the PICKAPP home screen
2. Enter the required user information (name, email, and phone number)
3. Tap the "Create Account" button
Expected Result: The user's new profile is created and saved in the PICKAPP database

Title: Verify the ability to create a commission
Preconditions: User has created a profile and logged in to the PICKAPP application
Test Data: Commission details (task description, location, and deadline)
Test Steps:
1. Tap the "Create Commission" button on the PICKAPP home screen
2. Enter the required commission details (task description, location, and deadline)
3. Tap the "Create" button
Expected Result: The commission is created and displayed on the user's commission list

Title: Verify the ability to create an offer for a product
Preconditions: User has created a profile and logged in to the PICKAPP application
Test Data: Product offer details (product name, description, price, and location)
Test Steps:
1. Tap the "Create Offer" button on the PICKAPP home screen
2. Enter the required product offer details (product name, description, price, and location)
3. Tap the "Create" button
Expected Result: The product offer is created and displayed on the user's product offer list

Title: Create User Profile
Preconditions: The app must be installed on the device.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the profile creation screen.
3. Enter the username and password.
4. Click on the create profile button.
Expected Result: A new user profile is created and stored in the database.

Title: Access User Profile
Preconditions: A user profile must be created.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the login screen.
3. Enter the username and password.
4. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: The user is logged in and navigated to the user profile screen.

Title: Creating a Commission
Preconditions: User has already created an account.
Test Steps:
1. User selects the "Create Commission" function.
2. User indicates the products needed.
3. User confirms the creation of the commission.
Expected Result: The commission is visible to the user and other users.

Title: Login to the Profile
Preconditions: User profile created
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Enter the username and password
3. Click on the "Login" button
Expected Result: The user is logged in to the application with the entered username and password.

Title: Cancel Commission
Preconditions: User has created a commission that is not yet taken by another user.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the commission created by the user.
2. Click on the "Cancel" button.
3. Confirm the cancellation in the pop-up.
Expected Result: The commission is removed from the user's and other users' view.

Title: Confirm Commission Completion
Preconditions: User has created a commission that is not yet taken by another user.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the commission created by the user.
2. Click on the "Complete" button.
3. Confirm the completion in the pop-up.
Expected Result: The commission is removed from the user's and other users' view.

Title: View User Who Accepted Commission
Preconditions: Another user has accepted the commission created by the user.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the commission created by the user.
2. Check the "Accepted by" section to view the user who accepted the commission.
Expected Result: The user who accepted the commission is displayed.

Title: Accept Other Users' Commissions
Preconditions: The user has the option to view other users' commissions.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Commissions" page.
2. Select a commission created by another user.
3. Click on the "Accept" button.
Expected Result: The commission is removed from the view of other users and the user who created the commission receives information about the user who accepted the commission.

Title: View Commissions Accepted by User
Preconditions: The user has accepted commissions from other users.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Commissions" page.
2. Check the "Accepted" section to view the commissions accepted by the user.
Expected Result: The commissions accepted by the user are displayed.

Title: Create Offer for Products
Preconditions: The user has products in excess or nearing expiration that they cannot consume.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Offers" page.
2. Click on the "Create Offer" button.
3. Enter the product details.
4. Click on the "Create" button.
Expected Result: The offer is created and displayed to other users.

Title: View Offers Created
Preconditions: The user has created offers.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Offers" page.
2. Check the "Created" section to view the offers created by the user.
Expected Result: The offers created by the user are displayed.

Title: Cancel Offer
Preconditions: The user has created an offer.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the offer created by the user.
2. Click on the "Cancel" button.
3. Confirm the cancellation in the pop-up.
Expected Result: The offer is removed from the user's and other users' view.

Title: Confirm Offer Completion
Preconditions: The user has created an offer.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the offer created by the user.
2. Click on the "Complete" button.
3. Confirm the completion in the pop-up.
Expected Result: The offer is removed from the user's and other users' view.

Title: View User Who Accepted Offer
Preconditions: Another user has accepted the offer created by the user.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the offer created by the user.
2. Check the "Accepted by" section to view the user who accepted the offer.
Expected Result: The user who accepted the offer is displayed.

Title: Accept Other Users' Offers
Preconditions: The user has the option to view other users' offers.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Offers" page.
2. Select an offer created by another user.
3. Click on the "Accept" button.
Expected Result: The offer is removed from the view of other users and the user who created the offer receives information about the user who accepted the offer.

Title: View Offers Accepted
Preconditions: The user has accepted offers from other users.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Offers" page.
2. Check the "Accepted" section to view the offers accepted by the user.
Expected Result: The offers accepted by the user are displayed.

Expected Result: The app files are removed automatically

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: The application is downloaded and installed correctly on the phone.
Test Data: Valid user details (name, email, password, location)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the registration screen.
3. Enter the user details.
4. Click on the 'Register' button.
Expected Result: The user is registered and can navigate to the main menu.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: The application is downloaded and installed correctly on the phone.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the login screen.
3. Enter the user credentials.
4. Click on the 'Login' button.
Expected Result: If the user credentials are correct, the user can navigate to the main menu. If not, the user is prompted to re-enter the credentials.

Title: Visualize Commission Accepted
Preconditions: The user has accepted a commission.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Commission Accepted screen.
2. Verify that the commission accepted is displayed.
3. Verify that the commission details are displayed.
4. Verify that the commission creator's information is displayed.
Expected Result: The user can view the commission details and the information about the user who created the commission.

Title: Cancel Offer Created
Preconditions: The user has created a commission.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Offers Created screen.
2. Select the offer to cancel.
3. Confirm the cancellation.
Expected Result: The offer is no longer visible.

Title: Confirm Offer Created
Preconditions: The user has created an offer.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Offers Created screen.
2. Select the offer to confirm.
3. Confirm the confirmation.
Expected Result: The user is taken to the Offers Created screen and the offer is no longer visible.

Title: Accept Offers from Others
Preconditions: The user has registered and logged in correctly.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Accept Offers screen.
2. Select an offer to accept.
3. Confirm the acceptance.
Expected Result: The user accepts the offer and it is no longer visible to other users.

Title: View Accepted Offers
Preconditions: The user has accepted an offer.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Accepted Offers screen.
2. Verify that the accepted offers are displayed.
3. Verify that the offer details are displayed.
4. Verify that the offer creator's information is displayed.
Expected Result: The user can view the offer details and the information about the user who created the offer.

Title: Firebase Database Functionality
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the Firebase database can store commission, user, and offer data.
2. Verify that the database allows real-time updates to avoid conflicts in reading and writing.
Expected Result: The Firebase database can store and update commission, user, and offer data in real-time.

Title: Android Device Requirements
Preconditions: None
Test Data: Android 4.6.1 or higher, GPS, 1 GB RAM, 10 MB free storage
Test Steps: 1. Verify that the device meets the minimum requirements for the application.
Expected Result: The device can run the application.
